  • 多层分析主线：Final model edge +1.6 points toward 平局拉扯.
  • 双方实力接近，临场发挥将决定走向
  • 中场控制权和定位球效率是关键

模型诊断与感知

mediumsingle_point_scoreline
4 次出现
mediumaway_floor_goal_rate_too_high
2 次出现
mediumclean_sheet_probability_missing
2 次出现
mediumevent_volatility_not_connected_to_goal_distribution
2 次出现
mediumscore_confidence_not_separated_from_result_confidence
2 次出现
mediumsecond_half_state_model_missing
2 次出现
mediumset_piece_threat_underweighted
2 次出现
mediumsubstitution_impact_underweighted
2 次出现

治理行动与优化计划

P0Public reports and dashboards must show partial hit / full hit separately: result direction is not the same as exact-score success.2026-06-12 13:32
P0Add scoreline_distribution with at least three candidate scores, probabilities and reasons.2026-06-12 13:26
P0Calculate clean-sheet probability for both teams and feed it into score selection.2026-06-12 13:26
P0Convert referee strictness, red-card risk, penalty risk and set-piece threat into total-goals and team-goals adjustments.2026-06-12 13:26
P0Add a canonical prediction registry per match that points to the locked accountable report and labels older parallel reports as superseded or non-canonical.2026-06-12 13:26
P1Model halftime-level, leading and trailing states separately, including substitution and chase-game effects.2026-06-12 13:26
P1Emit result_confidence, score_confidence and total_goals_confidence instead of one shared confidence label.2026-06-12 13:26
P1Do not allow mock odds or low-quality evidence to upgrade dual-track alignment or prediction confidence.2026-06-12 13:26

每日统计日志

2026-06-12

Brier: 0.2025
评估 1 场赛果 1 (100.0%)比分 0 (0.0%)
The model compressed the match into a low-event 1-0 and missed the second-half comeback and transition script.

2026-06-11

Brier: 0.2025
评估 1 场赛果 1 (100.0%)比分 0 (0.0%)
The model gave South Africa a baseline consolation goal instead of explicitly pricing a Mexico clean-sheet scenario.

物理层 & 天纪气运权重调节

操作指南
通过滑块调整各层决策指标的比重。修改完成后，点击右侧的 下载 model-hyperparameters.json 按钮，将文件保存到项目配置位置，下一次预测 Agent 运行时会自动加载新的超参配置。

大类权重配置 (主权重比例，总和为 1.0)

物理硬实力模型权重 (Data Weight) 0.60
控制物理层面对预测结果的影响比重。
天纪气运修正权重 (Divination Weight) 0.40
控制天纪气运修正对预测结果的干预程度。

物理层各评估维度比重 (相对比例，自动归一化)

FIFA 官方排名实力权重 0.30
阵容深度评估权重 0.20
历史交锋 (H2H) 权重 0.20
体能与旅行休整权重 0.15
外部情报完整度权重 0.15

配置文件实时预览
